blended.narrative: Steamboat is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,551 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 51".
